title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Nami, Carrot, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Chichi LISIA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sadness rains down on the sunny...

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: I can't believe Pedro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If only we were stronger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our enemies should be the ones crying right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't let your hearts get too clouded.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now, wait a minute, jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those stone-hearted words sure fell rather easily from your lips, didn't they?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After, you'd barely spent any time with Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm telling you that this isn't the time to be letting down your guard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: back at the coast, it was kill, or be killed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the sort of place we're in now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we knew that full well, coming in.

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: This is... A victory for Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You all have been watching, haven't you? Just how many do you think our enemies have lost?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From their perspective, they're going through an unprecedented disaster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can't you hear Pedro crying out from within yourselves?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: "Keep pushing forward!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Luffy grasped the situation in an instant,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and enacted a plan to take on the enemy by himself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dogtooth's got a billion Berry bounty! Luffy's life is on the line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: One day, they will come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From behind us, the pirate queen of these lands, big mom herself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who knows when the battle- ships of the enemy will materialize from beyond the mist?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: until we've at least made it out of the lands where big mom's will is absolute,

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 26 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
